---
name: Bug Report 🐛
about: Report an error in one of the Arduino code sketches
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**Which Project has the bug?**
(e.g., Project 04: Tilt Sensor)

**Describe the bug:**
(e.g., The LED doesn't turn off when the sensor is tilted back.)

**What did you expect to happen?**
(A clear description of what the code *should* do.)

**Error messages:**
(If the Arduino IDE threw a red error message when compiling, copy and paste it here!)
